parameters.query:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) as total_executions,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'success' THEN 1 END) as successful,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'failed' THEN 1 END) as failed,
  AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (completed_at - started_at)) * 1000) as avg_duration_ms,
  MIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (completed_at - started_at)) * 1000) as min_duration_ms,
  MAX(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (completed_at - started_at)) * 1000) as max_duration_ms
FROM workflow_executions
WHERE started_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'

SELECT
  COUNT(*) as total_leads,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'new' THEN 1 END) as new_leads,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'enriched' THEN 1 END) as enriched_leads,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'routed' THEN 1 END) as routed_leads
FROM leads
WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'

SELECT
  COUNT(*) as total_docs,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN processing_status = 'extracting' THEN 1 END) as processing_docs,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN validation_score >= 70 THEN 1 END) as valid_docs,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN validation_score < 70 THEN 1 END) as invalid_docs
FROM documents
WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'

SELECT
  COUNT(*) as total_tasks,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'pending' THEN 1 END) as pending_tasks,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'in_progress' THEN 1 END) as in_progress_tasks,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'completed' THEN 1 END) as completed_tasks,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'overdue' THEN 1 END) as overdue_tasks
FROM tasks
WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'

SELECT
  COUNT(*) as dlq_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN retry_attempt < max_retry_attempts THEN 1 END) as retryable_count,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN retry_attempt >= max_retry_attempts THEN 1 END) as failed_count
FROM dead_letter_queue
WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'

SELECT
  disk_usage_percent,
  active_connections as db_connections,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workflow_executions WHERE status = 'running') as active_executions
FROM (
  SELECT
    (pg_database_size('automation_platform')::float / (SELECT sum(pg_database_size(d.datname))::float FROM pg_database d WHERE d.datistemplate = false) * 100) as disk_usage_percent,
    (SELECT count(*) FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE datname = 'automation_platform') as active_connections
) t
LIMIT 1
